data.name: Sky Resort 2
data.detailed_description:
Sky Resort's reputation continues to grow... And it's all thanks to you!

Welcome new guests and show them to their VIP rooms, where anything lewd can happen. They're counting on you to have a pleasant stay! Will you give your customers what they yearn for?

Sky Resort 2 is the second of a series of kinetic eroge with high-quality 3D art that will cater to your kinks.
If you're into Cum Inflation, Futanari Sex, and Large Insertions, this is the perfect game for you!

Carefree and quite a tease, Delphi will stop at nothing to seduce and have her way with her target anywhere and anytime.

Nobody can resist her seductive skills!

Scarlett often comes off as a smug and bratty bitch, a trait that most people find hot, making them want to dominate her.
She's aware of that fact, taking full advantage to do whatever she pleases with her partners.
Who can't say no to a girl with thick thighs and even bigger tits?

Behind Veronica's prestigious therapist title lies an overly lewd woman looking for some relief.
Her job is demanding and doesn't allow her to have any proper fun.
Will her luck change at Sky Resort?

◆ Features

◇ An erotic story around 50k+ words long (from 3 to 4 hours of gameplay)
◇ Many lewd scenes that will ignite your senses (and make you play with one hand)
◇ Three steamy girls for you to meet (and bang)
◇ 4k high-quality graphics
◇ 300+ unique CGs
◇ 50 fully animated erotic scenes
◇ Detailed 3D backgrounds with multiple variations
◇ Image gallery, music room, and replay scene functionality
◇ Achievements, Easter eggs, and more!

data.short_description: Put yourself once more in the shoes of Sky's Resort manager, the kinkiest resort on Earth where everything and anything goes. Take care of your guests, their fetishes, and ensure they'll enjoy their stay!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
